title: F-MX-3-c kick infra closure (cycle 7 / fan-out 5/5) — raw 51 4-gate audit smell partial closure
scope: Final closure attempt for F-MX-3-c kick infra rebuild (5/5 sub-tasks). Land B.3 registry-push bypass plan (option-4 docker save/load), automate B.1 user-side reminder via tool/manual_login_reminder.hexa, live-validate B.5 cascade prevention (incl. the once-deferred raw 77 audit ledger append), and propose raw 51 4-gate audit smell partial closure with F-MANUAL-LOGIN ownership transfer for the residual user-TTY dependency.

B_3_registry_bypass_plan.primary_recommendation: Option 4 (docker save | ssh load) for one-shot convergence; Option 3 (ghcr.io) for durable channel
B_3_registry_bypass_plan.execution_status: NOT EXECUTED — requires explicit user approval per safety gate §6
safety_gates: user-go required before docker save/load OR ghcr.io push
arch pre-check (Mac arm64 vs target host) required
raw 138 witness ledger schema specified for any future execution

verification.hexa_run_blocked: the hexa runtime in this sandbox cannot find /usr/bin/python3 (sister tool falsifier_monitor.hexa exhibits identical sandbox error); raw 91 C3: hexa-side execution unverified — embedded python validated directly

B_5_cascade_validation.scope: Static + live-evidence re-validation of cascade prevention beyond cycle-2 witness

static_findings.trailer_function: _emit_all_routes_blocked_trailer at ~/core/nexus/scripts/bin/hexa_remote:717-826 (was 700-774 in cycle-2 witness; grew by ~50 lines with raw 77 ledger append)
static_findings.raw_77_gap_closed: cycle-2 witness flagged 'no raw 77 audit ledger append' as honest gap deferred to nexus PR. The dispatcher now contains the F-RAW77-CASCADE-LEDGER block (lines 778-826) that emits a structured JSONL row to ${HEXA_REMOTE_AUDIT_DIR:-$HOME/core/nexus/state/audit}/cascade_blocked_events.jsonl with raw 25 flock pattern + raw 12 silent-error fallback to plain-append on macOS

live_evidence.schema_match: all 16 rows include {ts, event=all-routes-blocked, external_blacklist:[], docker_neg_cache, slot_pool, reason, fallback_chain[], fix_steps[], ref='raw 66 + raw 77', host, agent='hexa_remote'}
live_evidence.verdict: B.5 cascade prevention LIVE-VALIDATED — both stderr trailer (raw 66) and persistent JSONL ledger (raw 77) fire on every all-routes-blocked event

B_5_cascade_validation.remaining_gap: none of the cycle-2 honest gaps remain open; the raw 77 deferral has been closed in nexus repo since the cycle-2 witness was written

closure_proposal.rationale: (b)+(d)+(e) FIXED; (c) Mac-FIXED with registry plan ready; (e) cascade prevention raw 77 gap closed live; only (a) has residual user-TTY dependency
closure_proposal.ownership_transfer: the residual user-TTY 11-profile relogin requirement is hereby formally transferred to F-MANUAL-LOGIN (deadline 2026-04-29T23:59:59Z) — automation cannot cross the manual-OAuth boundary. tool/manual_login_reminder.hexa is the persistent surface for that transferred responsibility.
closure_proposal.smell_residual: if F-MANUAL-LOGIN deadline passes without user action, raw 51 smell re-opens at higher tier (F-MX-3-c cycle 8 mandatory) and slot-picker live-probe patch (cycle-2 honest follow-up) becomes the next required code-side mitigation

falsifiers_preregistered.predicate: any new all-routes-blocked event between 2026-04-28T07:50Z and 2026-04-29T23:59Z that does NOT produce both (a) the raw 66 stderr trailer AND (b) a row in ~/core/nexus/state/audit/cascade_blocked_events.jsonl
falsifiers_preregistered.verifier: diff between count of 'err hexa_remote/all-routes-blocked' lines in dispatcher stderr captures vs row count in cascade_blocked_events.jsonl over the window — must be equal

falsifiers_preregistered.predicate: F-MANUAL-LOGIN deadline passes (2026-04-29T23:59:59Z) without ≥10 of the 11 broken profiles being recovered (verified via hetzner ssh `claude -p ping` exit 0)
falsifiers_preregistered.verifier: for n in 1 2 4 5 6 7 8 9 10 11 12; ssh hetzner CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR=/root/.claude-claude$n claude -p ping; count exit-0 outcomes; must be ≥10
falsifiers_preregistered.remediation_if_fired: raw 51 smell re-opens; cycle 8 mandatory; slot-picker live-probe code patch becomes next required mitigation

falsifiers_preregistered.predicate: registry-push bypass plan (Option 4 docker save/load OR Option 3 ghcr.io) executed without explicit user-go message AND without preflight checks (arch match, ssh reach, docker daemon up, df ≥1GB) all passing
falsifiers_preregistered.verifier: manual review of any state/kick_infra/registry_push.jsonl entries — every row MUST cite the user-go message id and contain the four preflight outcomes

falsifiers_preregistered.predicate: tool/manual_login_reminder.hexa --check returns non-zero AT ANY TIME inside the 24h window 2026-04-28T07:50Z … 2026-04-29T07:50Z while still ≥1 hour remains to F-MANUAL-LOGIN deadline
falsifiers_preregistered.verifier: cron-style hourly invocation: hexa run tool/manual_login_reminder.hexa --check; capture exit code; row must be 0 unless deadline-state==PASSED
falsifiers_preregistered.note: this falsifier intentionally fires if claude3 itself is also revoked, which would mean healthy_count==0; that is the kick-infra catastrophic case

falsifiers_preregistered.predicate: raw 51 smell is silently re-closed (status flipped to CLOSED in any future witness) WITHOUT all five (a..e) reaching gate_pass=yes AND without explicit F-MANUAL-LOGIN deadline transfer cited in the closure rationale
falsifiers_preregistered.verifier: grep -l 'raw 51' design/kick/*.json for any post-this-witness file claiming CLOSED; manually verify each cites this witness's closure_proposal block

what_works: B.3 registry plan: 4 options surveyed, primary path documented, 5 raw 71 falsifiers preregistered, own#22 lint PASS
B.1 reminder script: embedded python directly verified — all 3 modes (--status / --check / --alert) produce correct output; deadline countdown 40h (1d), broken=11, healthy=1
B.5 cascade prevention: live-validated via 16 ledger rows captured 2026-04-28T06:49Z..07:47Z; raw 77 gap from cycle-2 witness is CLOSED in nexus repo dispatcher (lines 778-826)
raw 51 audit closure: 4/5 sub-tasks gate-pass=yes; (a) ownership formally transferred to F-MANUAL-LOGIN with reminder surface in place
what_does_not_work: hexa run tool/manual_login_reminder.hexa cannot resolve /usr/bin/python3 in this sandbox (sister tool falsifier_monitor.hexa identical sandbox failure) — embedded python validated directly via the Bash tool's python3 instead; in normal user shell with python3 on PATH the .hexa entrypoint will work
Option 4 docker save/load NOT executed — requires user explicit go (per safety §6)
Option 3 ghcr.io NOT executed — requires PAT issuance + org permissions confirmation
11/12 profiles still need interactive `claude /login` (the F-MANUAL-LOGIN deadline is the user's responsibility now)
slot-picker live-probe patch (cycle-2 follow-up) NOT landed — defers to nexus-repo cycle if F-MANUAL-LOGIN passes without action
raw_91_c3_disclosure.honest_completeness_estimate: F-MX-3-c is FUNCTIONALLY CLOSED on the automation-side. The remaining 11-profile relogin and the registry-push execution are user-driven actions surfaced via tool/manual_login_reminder.hexa and proposals/hexa_weave_kick_infra_b3_registry_2026_04_28.md respectively. raw 51 smell is partially closed (4/5 cleanly + 1 ownership-transferred) — formal full-closure waits on F-MANUAL-LOGIN deadline outcome 2026-04-29T23:59:59Z.
raw_91_c3_disclosure.scope_creep_check: raw 106: kept strictly to the 5-bullet mission. Did NOT modify slot_picker, did NOT touch hexa_remote, did NOT execute any docker save/push, did NOT send external comms.
raw_91_c3_disclosure.raw_138_witness_consistency: this witness consolidates B.1+B.3+B.5 cycle-2 predecessors into a single cycle-7 closure record; predecessor witnesses remain authoritative for their respective sub-task internals.

korean_report_400char: 1) B.3 옵션4 (docker save|ssh load) plan 작성 → proposals/hexa_weave_kick_infra_b3_registry_2026_04_28.md (own22 lint PASS, 4옵션+5 falsifier, 사용자-go 대기). 2) B.1 tool/manual_login_reminder.hexa 작성 → 11 broken + 1 healthy(claude3) listing, 마감 40h WARN, raw13 stdout-only, 3 모드 직접-py 검증 PASS (hexa-runtime는 sandbox python3 미발견). 3) B.5 cascade prevention LIVE-검증: nexus dispatcher hexa_remote에 raw77 ledger append (lines 778-826) 추가됨, ~/core/nexus/state/audit/cascade_blocked_events.jsonl 에 16건 row (06:49Z..07:47Z) 캡처됨 — cycle-2 honest gap 전부 CLOSED. 4) raw51 4-gate audit smell: (b)/(d)/(e) FIXED, (c) Mac+plan, (a) F-MANUAL-LOGIN 책임이관 → 4/5 closure (부분), 형식적 full-closure는 4/29 23:59Z 사용자 11회 /login 결과 대기. 5) raw91 C3: 사용자 manual TTY 의존 잔존 11회, registry-push 미실행 (사용자 승인 필요), slot-picker live-probe 패치 미land (다음 cycle 후속).
